Scenario- and model-cluster bootstrap used 5000 iterations with seed 20260716.
Cross-classified GLMM was prespecified as supportive only; downgrade triggered because of small cluster counts, nesting, sparse 0%/100% model rates, and unavailable GLMM runtime.
Model-category contrasts are exploratory; no causal claim or model ranking is supported.

A8 Core has 12 scenario clusters, 12 model clusters, 32 events, model_category nested within model, and several model-level 0% or 100% failure rates; local environment lacks R/lme4/brms/statsmodels GLMM support.
Model-level exact permutation, response-level descriptive contrasts, leave-one-model/domain sensitivity, and scenario/model cluster bootstrap
No unstable mixed-model odds ratio is reported as core evidence.
Provides a transparent unclustered contrast but does not respect crossed model-scenario dependence.
Model-level permutation is preferred for model-category claims.
Use only as descriptive supporting information.
